basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years Relaxation as per AIIMS/DST rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. / 3 years diploma in Engineering & Technology from a recognized university or Equivalent.
qualification.details: B.Sc. / 3 years diploma in Engineering & Technology from a recognized university or Equivalent.

selection_process: Application via Email/Google Form Shortlisting Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Assistant I position at AIIMS Delhi is June 1, 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant I post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant I role, candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree or a 3-year diploma in Engineering & Technology from a recognized university or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Assistant I position is 50 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per AIIMS/DST rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant I position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Assistant I post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000 plus HRA at 30%. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Assistant I job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application with all required documents to the official email address provided in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant I in this recruitment drive by AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant I role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial application via email or Google Form, followed by shortlisting of candidates, and finally an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job. The position is for a Project Assistant I on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
